chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-141 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 434/24 3.For hearing of main case 07-03-2025 None present for the Petitioners. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received. However, on perusal of petition, it reflects that same has been filed for protection, to which an alternate remedy is available to the petitioners, but the same has not been availed. Accordingly, instant petition being misconceived is dismissed along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
